prompt: I have a schema file at /tmp/my-schema.json for the hacker news API. Push it to the hermai registry so other agents can use it.

assertions.name: uses_push_command
assertions.description: Uses 'hermai registry push' or 'POST /v1/schemas' to upload

assertions.name: mentions_auth
assertions.description: Mentions API key or hermai registry login is needed

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Uses the correct push mechanism (CLI command or API endpoint)
